name: @spine/hub-spa
description: Spine Hub web SPA (V3 Wave 3 part 2 — Squad SPA1 scaffold). SvelteKit + Vite + TS + Tailwind, builds to static assets that hub/ FastAPI serves under /static/spa/. Per design decision #3 (Hub-as-product, 9 surfaces), #25 (Keycloak OIDC), #28 (responsive Day 1), #18 (closed-source, MIT/Apache JS only).

comments.framework: Svelte 4 (not Svelte 5 runes) — stable LTS; SvelteKit 2 wraps it with file-based routing, auth-guarded layouts, and adapter-static for SPA build output.
comments.licensing: All deps are MIT or Apache 2.0 per design decision #18 (closed-source v1.0, no GPL/AGPL JS).
comments.no-install: Squad SPA1 scope: declare deps only; do NOT run npm install (no network). Hub Docker build runs `npm ci && npm run build` per shared/ui/spa/README.md.
